/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libvision_detector__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libvision_detector__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/vision_detector__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/vision_detector/msg/drone_diff__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vision_detector__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/vision_detector/msg/gimbal_info__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kevin/radar_ws/build/vision_detector:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libvision_detector__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
